address_uz: Xorazm viloyati, Urganch shahri, Ashxobod MFY, Sanoatchilar ko'chasi, 85J-uy
address_en: Sanoatchilar street 85J, Ashkhabad MFY, Urgench city, Khorezm region, Uzbekistan
about_uz: "OZ-LEK" MCHJ — Xorazm viloyati, Urganch shahrida joylashgan farmatsevtika tovarlarini ulgurji sotish bilan shug'ullanuvchi kompaniya. Biz Belarusiyaning "Лекфарm" kompaniyasi bilan tuzilgan shartnoma asosida sifatli dori vositalarini O'zbekistonga olib kiramiz va mijozlarga ishonchli yetkazib beramiz.
about_en: "OZ-LEK" LLC is a pharmaceutical wholesale trading company based in Urgench, Khorezm region. Under an agreement with the Belarusian company "Лекфарм", we import quality medicines into Uzbekistan and deliver them reliably to our customers.
